core_mechanism: a complex macroscopic order-parameter field governed by a nonlinear Schrödinger (Gross-Pitaevskii) equation, whose phase supports topologically quantised winding defects (vortices with integer circulation)
brief_reason: The abstract explains the observed pinned quantised vortices and the quantization of angular momentum via a generalised Gross-Pitaevskii equation for a coherent condensed fluid, i.e. a nonlinear-Schrödinger order-parameter field carrying quantised phase-winding vortices.
